name: renpy-intellisense
description: Language Server for Ren'Py - hovers, completions, definitions, and more for .rpy / .rpym files

commands.title: Ren'Py IntelliSense: Apply recommended workspace settings

renpyDocHover.fetchOnline.description: Fetch documentation text from https://www.renpy.org/doc/html/ when hovering (requires network). If false, only shows title and doc link from the index.

renpyDocHover.cacheSize.description: Maximum number of fetched doc pages to keep in memory (0 disables caching).

renpyDocHover.preferLocalDocstring.description: Show docstrings from your own definitions (triple-quoted or # comment blocks) in hovers when present.

renpyDocHover.showOnlineDocsWithLocal.description: When a local docstring exists and the symbol is also in the Ren'Py manual, append the online excerpt below a separator.

renpyDocHover.complementMode.description: Complement mode: Only show information that other extensions (like Ren'Py Language) don't provide. This avoids duplicate hovers. For built-in symbols: only online docs. For classes/functions/labels: only hierarchy info and cross-references. For variables: full docstrings (since other extensions don't support variable docstrings).

renpyDocHover.complementModeDisableDefin.description: When complement mode is enabled, also disable the Go to Definition provider to avoid duplicate definition results with other extensions.
